'''banasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbat|sabbat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbat|sabbat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| banasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bænæshæth|bænæshæth]] || [[word:bænæshæj|bænæshæj]] || [[word:bænæshæsh|bænæshæsh]] || [[word:bænæshæ|bænæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bananashath|bananashath]] || [[word:bananashaj|bananashaj]] || [[word:bananashash|bananashash]] || [[word:bananasha|bananasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:banashath|banashath]] || [[word:banashaj|banashaj]] || [[word:banashash|banashash]] || [[word:banasha|banasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:banafshath|banafshath]] || [[word:banafshaj|banafshaj]] || [[word:banafshash|banafshash]] || [[word:banafshaf|banafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banashatha|banashatha]] || [[word:banashaja|banashaja]] || [[word:banashasha|banashasha]] || [[word:banashaka|banashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banashath|banashath]] || [[word:banashaj|banashaj]] || [[word:banashash|banashash]] || [[word:banasha|banasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banashathal|banashathal]] || [[word:banashajal|banashajal]] || [[word:banashashal|banashashal]] || [[word:banashakal|banashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banashathatha|banashathatha]] || [[word:banashajaja|banashajaja]] || [[word:banashashasha|banashashasha]] || [[word:banashaka|banashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banashathan|banashathan]] || [[word:banashajan|banashajan]] || [[word:banashashan|banashashan]] || [[word:banashakan|banashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banashathaoro|banashathaoro]] || [[word:banashajaoro|banashajaoro]] || [[word:banashashaoro|banashashaoro]] || [[word:banashakaoro|banashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
